privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating three synthetic pay codes: 'Hazmat Bonus', 'Trainer Premium', and 'Lost Equipment Fee'. This is explicitly verified by the instructions and the result extraction script (export_result.sh) which queries the TimeTrex PostgreSQL database for exactly these names.
